AR1.justification: Step 1 artifact landed in tmp/incident-postmortem/<slug>/timeline.md and the stall/intent was logged in daybook/2026-05-17.md, matching the methodology's routing for working artifacts vs. chronological surface.

AR2.justification: Step 1 produced its named artifact (timeline.md) on disk, and the agent visibly stalled at step 2 naming exactly what input was missing rather than fabricating downstream artifacts.

AR3.justification: All references use workspace-relative paths (runbooks/incident-postmortem/AGENTS.md, tmp/incident-postmortem/<dated-slug>/timeline.md, daybook/2026-05-17.md, projects/postmortems/<dated-slug>.md) with ISO date anchors that resolve.

AR4.justification: Created files are placeholder shells in a dated incident folder and an append-only daybook entry; re-running would either no-op or extend without corrupting prior state.
